coordinate_frame.origin_description: grid cell (row=0, col=0) top-left corner — bounding box minimum minus padding

query_hint.world_to_cell: col = floor((wx - origin.x) / resolution_m); row = floor((wy - origin.y) / resolution_m)
query_hint.crosses_wall: Bresenham line from cell(x1,y1) to cell(x2,y2); if any cell is 1 or 3 → True; if any cell is 4 → exact Shapely segment test
